instructions.name: accept_admin
docs: Accepts a pending admin transfer. Only callable by the pending admin.

accounts.name: new_admin
docs: The pending admin who is accepting the transfer.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration account to be updated.

instructions.name: buy_exact_in
docs: Buys base tokens by providing an exact amount of quote tokens (exact input).
# Arguments
* `amount_in` - Exact quote tokens to spend (before transfer fees).
* `minimum_amount_out` - Minimum base tokens to receive (after transfer fees; slippage protection).

accounts.name: pool
docs: The program account of the pool in which the swap will be performed.

accounts.name: base_token_account
docs: The user token account for input token.

accounts.name: quote_token_account
docs: The user token account for output token.

accounts.name: base_vault
docs: The vault token account for input token.

accounts.name: quote_vault
docs: The vault token account for output token.

accounts.name: observation_state
docs: The program account for the most recent oracle observation.

accounts.name: fee_recipient
docs: The protocol fee recipient. Must be one of the allowed recipients in Config.
NOTE: Validation happens in handler by checking against global_config.fee_recipients.
Fee recipients are admin-controlled pubkeys stored in AmmConfig, so an attacker
cannot pass an arbitrary account - it must match one of the configured recipients.

accounts.name: protocol_fee_vault
docs: The protocol fee vault.

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: Fee vault PDA from liquid-fees (authority for fee_vault_token_account).

accounts.name: fee_vault_token_account
docs: Fee vault token account for Recipients mode â€” accumulates quote tokens.

accounts.name: buyback_vault
docs: Buyback vault (for Revoked mode) â€” accumulates quote tokens for buy-and-burn.
Initialized during pool creation.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Pool vault and LP mint authority.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration for the protocol.

accounts.name: creator
docs: Pool creator (needed for fee vault derivation).
NOTE: Validation relies on `has_one = creator` constraint on pool state.
The creator is whoever signed the original pool creation transaction,
stored immutably in PoolState. No separate ownership check is needed
as the pool state is the source of truth for creator identity.

accounts.name: base_mint
docs: The mint of input token.

accounts.name: quote_mint
docs: The mint of output token.

accounts.name: fee_config
docs: The fee configuration for this token (from liquid-fees program).
base_mint is typically the token that was launched on the bonding curve.

accounts.name: user_properties
docs: User properties from liquid-state.

accounts.name: global_amm_volume
docs: Global AMM volume accumulator from liquid-state.

accounts.name: token_volume
docs: Token volume accumulator from liquid-state (for base_mint).

accounts.name: user
docs: The user performing the trade.

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: The token mint, used for token_volume PDA derivation.

accounts.name: cashback_config
docs: Cashback configuration from liquid-state.

accounts.name: liquid_state_program
docs: liquid-state program for unified state management.

accounts.name: state_events_cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA owned by liquid-state for emitting events via liquid-events.

accounts.name: base_token_program
docs: SPL program for input token transfers.

accounts.name: quote_token_program
docs: SPL program for output token transfers.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA â€” proves this program's identity in cross-program calls.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for CPI event emission.

accounts.name: oracle_price_feed
docs: Pyth SOL/USD price feed (required for tiered fees).

instructions.name: buy_exact_out
docs: Buys base tokens by providing quote tokens to the pool (exact output).
# Arguments
* `max_amount_in` - Maximum quote tokens willing to spend (including transfer fees; slippage protection).
* `amount_out` - Exact base tokens the user wants to receive (after transfer fees).

accounts.name: pool
docs: The program account of the pool in which the swap will be performed.

accounts.name: base_token_account
docs: The user token account for input token.

accounts.name: quote_token_account
docs: The user token account for output token.

accounts.name: base_vault
docs: The vault token account for input token.

accounts.name: quote_vault
docs: The vault token account for output token.

accounts.name: observation_state
docs: The program account for the most recent oracle observation.

accounts.name: fee_recipient
docs: The protocol fee recipient. Must be one of the allowed recipients in Config.
NOTE: Validation happens in handler by checking against global_config.fee_recipients.
Fee recipients are admin-controlled pubkeys stored in AmmConfig, so an attacker
cannot pass an arbitrary account - it must match one of the configured recipients.

docs: The protocol fee vault.

docs: Fee vault PDA from liquid-fees (authority for fee_vault_token_account).

docs: Global AMM volume accumulator from liquid-state.

accounts.name: state_events_cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA owned by liquid-state for emitting events via liquid-events.

docs: SPL program for input token transfers.

accounts.name: quote_token_program
docs: SPL program for output token transfers.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA â€” proves this program's identity in cross-program calls.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for CPI event emission.

accounts.name: oracle_price_feed
docs: Pyth SOL/USD price feed (required for tiered fees).

instructions.name: cancel_admin_transfer
docs: Cancels a pending admin transfer. Callable by either the current admin or the pending admin.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The authority cancelling the transfer (current admin or pending admin).

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration account to be updated.

instructions.name: create
docs: Creates an AMM pool for the given token pair with an initial deposit.
# Arguments
* `init_amount_base` - Initial base token amount to deposit into the pool.
* `init_amount_quote` - Initial quote token amount to deposit into the pool.
* `creator` - Optional creator pubkey (for program-initiated migration pools).

accounts.name: signer
docs: Token authority for the pool creator.
Must be Global Admin OR Allowed CPI Authority.
Signs for token transfers (base, quote) and LP burn.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Rent payer for account initialization.
Separate from signer to support CPI where the token authority (signer)
is a PDA that cannot pay rent via system transfers.

accounts.name: pool_state
docs: Account to store the pool state.

accounts.name: lp_mint
docs: Pool LP mint.

accounts.name: creator_base
docs: Creator base account.

accounts.name: creator_quote
docs: Creator quote account.

accounts.name: creator_lp_token
docs: Creator LP token account.

accounts.name: base_vault
docs: Base vault for the pool.

accounts.name: quote_vault
docs: Quote vault for the pool.

accounts.name: observation_state
docs: Account to store oracle observations.

accounts.name: buyback_vault
docs: Buyback vault for Revoked-mode creator fee accumulation (buy-and-burn).

accounts.name: token_volume
docs: Token volume accumulator from liquid-state.

accounts.name: fee_config
docs: Fee config PDA (from liquid-fees). Initialized via CPI for user-created pools.

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: Fee vault PDA (from liquid-fees).

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration for the protocol.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Pool vault and LP mint authority.

accounts.name: base_mint
docs: Base mint (Variable token).

accounts.name: quote_mint
docs: Quote mint

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA â€” proves this program's identity in cross-program calls.

accounts.name: liquid_state_program
docs: Liquid state program for token volume CPI.

accounts.name: liquid_fees_program
docs: Liquid fees program for fee configuration CPI.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for CPI event emission.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Program to create mint account and mint tokens.

accounts.name: base_token_program
docs: SPL token program or token program 2022 for base.

accounts.name: quote_token_program
docs: SPL token program or token program 2022 for quote.

accounts.name: associated_token_program
docs: Program to create an ATA for receiving position NFT.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: To create a new program account.

instructions.name: deposit
docs: Deposits liquidity into the pool, minting LP tokens to the owner.
# Arguments
* `lp_token_amount` - Number of LP tokens to mint.
* `maximum_base_token_amount` - Maximum base tokens willing to deposit (slippage protection).
* `maximum_quote_token_amount` - Maximum quote tokens willing to deposit (slippage protection).

accounts.name: owner
docs: The owner depositing liquidity into the pool.

accounts.name: pool_state
docs: Pool state account validated against base/quote vaults and LP mint.

accounts.name: owner_lp_token
docs: Owner LP token account.

accounts.name: base_account
docs: The payer's token account for base token.

accounts.name: quote_account
docs: The payer's token account for quote token.

accounts.name: base_vault
docs: The address that holds pool tokens for base token.

accounts.name: quote_vault
docs: The address that holds pool tokens for quote token.

accounts.name: lp_mint
docs: LP token mint.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration for the protocol.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Pool vault and LP mint authority.

accounts.name: base_mint
docs: The mint of base vault.

accounts.name: quote_mint
docs: The mint of quote vault.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA â€” proves this program's identity in cross-program calls.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for CPI event emission.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token program.

accounts.name: token_program_2022
docs: Token program 2022.

instructions.name: execute_buyback
docs: Executes a buyback operation using accumulated revoked creator fees.
This is a permissionless instruction that swaps quote tokens from the
buyback vault for base tokens and burns them.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can trigger the buyback (permissionless).

accounts.name: pool
docs: The program account of the pool.

accounts.name: base_mint
docs: The base token mint (the token that will be bought and burned).

accounts.name: base_vault
docs: The vault token account for base tokens.

accounts.name: quote_vault
docs: The vault token account for quote tokens.

accounts.name: observation_state
docs: The program account for the most recent oracle observation.

accounts.name: buyback_vault
docs: The buyback vault holding accumulated quote tokens for buyback.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration for the protocol.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Pool vault and LP mint authority.

accounts.name: quote_mint
docs: The quote token mint.

accounts.name: fee_config
docs: The fee configuration for this token (must be in Revoked mode).

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA â€” proves this program's identity in cross-program calls.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for CPI event emission.

accounts.name: base_token_program
docs: SPL program for base token operations.

accounts.name: quote_token_program
docs: SPL program for quote token operations.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initializes the protocol's global configuration.
Note: Fee recipients are NOT set during initialization. Call `set_fee_recipients`
after initialization to configure the protocol's fee recipients.
# Arguments
* `fee_tiers` - Market cap-based fee tiers (at least one required).
* `oracle_price_feed` - Pyth SOL/USD price feed address.
* `quote_mints` - List of valid quote mints.

accounts.name: admin
docs: The admin initializing the protocol (becomes admin).

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Initialize config state account to store protocol owner address and fee rates.

instructions.name: initialize_fee_recipient_vaults
docs: Initializes token vaults for all fee recipients for a given quote mint.
This is a permissionless, idempotent instruction that creates token accounts
for fee recipients. Anyone can call this to ensure protocol fees can be collected
for token-based trading pairs.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Payer for account creation (permissionless - anyone can pay).

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration (read-only, to validate fee_recipients).

accounts.name: quote_mint
docs: The quote mint to create token accounts for.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token program for the quote mint.

accounts.name: associated_token_program
docs: Associated token program for ATA creation.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for account creation.

instructions.name: pause
docs: Pauses the protocol. Only callable by admin.
When paused, buy and sell operations are disabled.

accounts.name: admin
docs: The admin authorized to pause the protocol.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration account to be updated.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA â€” proves this program's identity in cross-program calls.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for CPI event emission.

instructions.name: sell_exact_in
docs: Sells base tokens by providing them to the pool and receiving quote tokens (exact input).
# Arguments
* `amount_in` - Exact amount of base tokens to sell (before transfer fees).
* `minimum_amount_out` - Minimum quote tokens expected (after transfer fees; slippage protection).

instructions.name: sell_exact_out
docs: Sells base tokens to receive an exact amount of quote tokens.
# Arguments
* `max_amount_in` - Maximum base tokens willing to sell (slippage protection).
* `exact_amount_out` - Exact net quote tokens to receive.

instructions.name: set_fee_recipients
docs: Sets the protocol's fee recipients. Only callable by the admin.
# Arguments
* `fee_recipients` - List of protocol fee recipients (must be exactly NUM_FEE_RECIPIENTS).

accounts.name: admin
docs: The admin authorized to update the global config.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration account to be updated.

instructions.name: transfer_admin
docs: Proposes an admin transfer to a new address. Only callable by the current admin.
The new admin must call `accept_admin` to complete the transfer.
# Arguments
* `new_admin` - The proposed new admin authority public key.

accounts.name: admin
docs: The current admin authorizing the transfer.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration account to be updated.

instructions.name: unpause
docs: Unpauses the protocol. Only callable by admin.

accounts.name: admin
docs: The admin authorized to unpause the protocol.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration account to be updated.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA â€” proves this program's identity in cross-program calls.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for CPI event emission.

instructions.name: update
docs: Updates the AMM configuration. Must be called by the admin.
# Arguments
* `quote_mints` - Optional new list of valid quote mints.
* `fee_tiers` - Optional new fee tiers (at least one required if provided).
* `oracle_price_feed` - Optional new Pyth SOL/USD price feed address.

accounts.name: admin
docs: The admin authorized to update the config.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Amm config account to be changed

instructions.name: withdraw
docs: Withdraws liquidity from the pool, burning LP tokens and returning base and quote tokens.
# Arguments
* `lp_token_amount` - Number of LP tokens to burn.
* `minimum_base_amount` - Minimum base tokens expected to receive (slippage protection).
* `minimum_quote_amount` - Minimum quote tokens expected to receive (slippage protection).

accounts.name: owner
docs: The owner withdrawing liquidity from the pool.

accounts.name: pool_state
docs: Pool state account validated against base/quote vaults and LP mint.

accounts.name: owner_lp_token
docs: Owner LP token account.

accounts.name: base_account
docs: The token account to receive base token.

accounts.name: quote_account
docs: The token account to receive quote token.

accounts.name: base_vault
docs: The address that holds pool tokens for base token.

accounts.name: quote_vault
docs: The address that holds pool tokens for quote token.

accounts.name: lp_mint
docs: Pool LP token mint.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration for the protocol.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Pool vault and LP mint authority.

docs: The mint of base vault.

accounts.name: quote_mint

errors.name: InvalidAdminAuthority
errors.msg: The provided admin authority is invalid

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: You are not authorized to perform this action

errors.name: NoPendingAdminTransfer
errors.msg: No pending admin transfer exists

errors.name: NotPendingAdmin
errors.msg: Caller is not the pending admin

errors.name: ProtocolPaused
errors.msg: Protocol is paused

errors.name: InvalidInput
errors.msg: The provided input parameters are invalid

errors.name: InvalidVault
errors.msg: Invalid vault

errors.name: IncorrectLpMint
errors.msg: Address of the provided LP token mint is incorrect

errors.name: NotSupportMint
errors.msg: Token-2022 mint extension is not supported

errors.name: BaseIsQuoteMint
errors.msg: Base token mint cannot be a whitelisted quote currency

errors.name: InsufficientInitialLiquidity
errors.msg: Initial LP amount is too small

errors.name: EmptySupply
errors.msg: Input token account is empty

errors.name: ZeroTradingTokens
errors.msg: Given pool token amount results in zero trading tokens

errors.name: SlippageExceeded
errors.msg: Slippage tolerance exceeded

errors.name: InsufficientVault
errors.msg: Insufficient tokens in vault

errors.name: TransferFeeCalculateNotMatch
errors.msg: Transfer fee calculation does not match

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic operation resulted in overflow

errors.name: InvalidFeeModel
errors.msg: Invalid fee configuration

errors.name: NoFeeCollect
errors.msg: No fees available to collect

errors.name: IncorrectFeeRecipientsCount
errors.msg: Incorrect number of protocol fee recipients provided

errors.name: TooManyQuoteMints
errors.msg: Too many quote mints provided

errors.name: InvalidCreatorVault
errors.msg: Invalid creator vault

errors.name: NotWhitelisted
errors.msg: Quote token mint is not allowed

errors.name: InvalidFeeRecipient
errors.msg: The fee recipient provided is not in the global configuration

errors.name: CreatorFeesNotRevoked
errors.msg: Creator fees have not been revoked - buyback not available

errors.name: NoBuybackFunds
errors.msg: No funds available for buyback

errors.name: DuplicateQuoteMint
errors.msg: Duplicate quote mint provided

errors.name: OracleFeedRequired
errors.msg: Oracle price feed is required when tiered fees are enabled

errors.name: InvalidOracleFeed
errors.msg: Oracle price feed address does not match configuration or invalid owner

errors.name: StalePriceFeed
errors.msg: Oracle price data is too old (stale)

errors.name: InvalidPriceFeed
errors.msg: Invalid price data received from oracle

errors.name: NoFeeTiersConfigured
errors.msg: No fee tiers are configured

errors.name: InvalidFeeTierConfiguration
errors.msg: Invalid fee tier configuration (check ranges, ordering, and contiguity)

errors.name: TooManyFeeTiers
errors.msg: Too many fee tiers provided (max 32)

errors.name: NoFeeTiersProvided
errors.msg: At least one fee tier is required

errors.name: InvalidPoolState
errors.msg: Invalid pool state (empty vaults or invalid reserves)

types.name: AmmConfig
docs: Holds the current owner of the factory and global fee configurations.

fields.name: admin_authority
docs: Admin authority who can update the config.

fields.name: fee_recipients
docs: List of valid protocol fee recipients.

fields.name: quote_mints
docs: List of valid quote mints for liquidity pools.

fields.name: fee_tiers
docs: Market cap-based fee tiers.

fields.name: oracle_price_feed
docs: Pyth SOL/USD price feed address.

fields.name: pending_admin
docs: Pending admin authority for two-step transfer. None if no transfer is in progress.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump to identify PDA.

fields.name: paused
docs: Whether the protocol is paused (emergency stop).

types.name: CashbackConfiguration
docs: Global cashback configuration
PDA: [b"cashback_config"]

fields.name: admin_authority
docs: Admin authority who can update configuration

fields.name: ranges
docs: Balance-based multiplier ranges (use len() for active count).
Thresholds refer to the user's cashback credit balance. Multiplier is
applied progressively as credits are earned, not at mode-switch.

fields.name: trader_cashback_basis_points
docs: Base trader cashback rate in basis points

fields.name: pending_admin
docs: Pending admin authority for two-step transfer. None if no transfer is in progress.

types.name: CashbackRange
docs: Cashback range defining balance-based multiplier tiers.
Each range maps a cashback balance interval to a multiplier. When a user earns
cashback, the earned amount is multiplied by the tier corresponding to their
current balance. If earning crosses a tier boundary, the amount is split so
each portion receives its respective tier's multiplier.

fields.name: range_start_inclusive
docs: Lower bound of balance range (inclusive), in USD with 6 decimals

fields.name: range_end_exclusive
docs: Upper bound of balance range (exclusive), in USD with 6 decimals

fields.name: multiplier_basis_points
docs: Multiplier in basis points (10000 = 1x, 20000 = 2x)

types.name: FeeMode
docs: The fee distribution mode for a token's fee configuration.

types.name: FeeRecipient
docs: A fee recipient with their allocation and vault PDA bump.

fields.name: pubkey
docs: The public key of the fee recipient.

fields.name: basis_points
docs: The recipient's share of fees in basis points (out of 10,000).

fields.name: vault_bump
docs: The bump seed for the recipient's vault PDA.

fields.name: _padding
docs: Padding to align to 8-byte boundary (32 + 2 + 1 + 5 = 40 bytes).

types.name: FeeTier
docs: Market cap-based fee tier definition.
Defines a market cap range and the corresponding fee rates to apply
when the pool's fully diluted valuation (FDV) falls within that range.

fields.name: range_start_inclusive
docs: Market cap range start (inclusive) in USD with 6 decimals.

fields.name: range_end_exclusive
docs: Market cap range end (exclusive) in USD with 6 decimals.

fields.name: lp_fee_rate
docs: LP fee rate in basis points for this tier.

fields.name: protocol_fee_rate
docs: Protocol fee rate in basis points for this tier.

fields.name: creator_fee_rate
docs: Creator fee rate in basis points for this tier.

types.name: GlobalAmmVolumeAccumulator
docs: Global volume accumulator for AMM trades
PDA: [b"global_amm_volume"]

fields.name: total_usd_volume
docs: Total USD volume across all AMM trades (6 decimals)

fields.name: total_token_volume
docs: Total token volume across all AMM trades

types.name: Observation
docs: The element of observations in ObservationState

fields.name: block_timestamp
docs: The block timestamp of the observation

fields.name: cumulative_base_price_x32
docs: the cumulative of base price during the duration time, Q32.32, the remaining 64 bit for overflow

fields.name: cumulative_quote_price_x32
docs: the cumulative of quote price during the duration time, Q32.32, the remaining 64 bit for overflow

fields.name: initialized
docs: Whether the ObservationState is initialized

fields.name: observation_index
docs: the most-recently updated index of the observations array

fields.name: observations
docs: observation array

fields.name: last_update_timestamp
docs: the last update timestamp

fields.name: padding
docs: padding for feature update

fields.name: base_vault
docs: Base Token Vault

fields.name: quote_vault
docs: Quote Token Vault

fields.name: lp_mint
docs: Pool tokens are issued when Base or Quote tokens are deposited.

fields.name: base_mint
docs: Mint information for Base

fields.name: quote_mint
docs: Mint information for quote

fields.name: base_token_program
docs: Base program

fields.name: quote_token_program
docs: Quote program

fields.name: observation_key
docs: Observation account to store oracle data

fields.name: lp_mint_decimals
docs: Mint decimals for LP token

fields.name: base_decimals
docs: Mint base decimals

fields.name: quote_decimals
docs: Mint quote decimals

fields.name: lp_supply
docs: True circulating supply without burns and lock ups

fields.name: creator
docs: Creator of the token

fields.name: recent_epoch
docs: Recent epoch

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for PDA

types.name: TokenVolumeAccumulator
docs: Token-specific volume accumulator (unified across curve and AMM)
PDA: [b"token_volume", mint.key()]

fields.name: mint
docs: Token mint this accumulator tracks

fields.name: total_usd_volume
docs: Total USD volume for this token (curve + AMM, 6 decimals)

fields.name: total_token_volume
docs: Total token volume for this token (curve + AMM)

fields.name: curve_usd_volume
docs: USD volume from curve trades (for analytics)

fields.name: amm_usd_volume
docs: USD volume from AMM trades (for analytics)

types.name: UnifiedFeeConfiguration
docs: Unified fee configuration for a token, supporting both Recipients and Revoked modes.
Stored as a zero-copy account for efficient access in hot paths.

fields.name: creator
docs: The creator who owns this fee configuration

fields.name: token_mint
docs: The token mint this configuration applies to.
This is the key identifier that persists across migration from bonding curve to AMM.

fields.name: quote_mint
docs: The quote token mint used for fee accumulation (e.g., WSOL for native curves, USDC for stable).
`Pubkey::default()` indicates no token fee vault (Revoked-only configs).

fields.name: fee_mode
docs: Current fee mode

fields.name: recipients_count
docs: Number of active recipients in the recipients array

fields.name: recipients
docs: Recipients for Recipients mode (fixed array, use recipients_count for active length)

fields.name: update_authority
docs: Authority that can modify this configuration (initially creator)

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA derivation
